name: l2_static_airframe_multi_axis_sweep_plan
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeMultiAxisSweepPlan expands each static-airframe preset into forward reverse sideslip and angle-of-attack L2 force/moment request targets.
note: Reference surface for future live multi-axis A4MC L2 static-airframe coefficient fitting.

name: l2_drone_probe_geometry
value: Aerodynamics4McL2DroneProbe supplies the solid mask grid and body ellipsoid geometry reused by every sweep case.
note: Reference surface for future live multi-axis A4MC L2 static-airframe coefficient fitting.

name: l2_static_airframe_gameplay_fit_candidate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeGameplayFitCandidate remains forward-drag-only until this multi-axis sweep has live force moment and pressure-center results.
note: Reference surface for future live multi-axis A4MC L2 static-airframe coefficient fitting.

name: drone_physics_airframe
value: DronePhysics contains drag lift sideforce attitude torque and pressure-center paths that need multi-axis coefficient evidence before retuning.
note: Reference surface for future live multi-axis A4MC L2 static-airframe coefficient fitting.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for live multi-axis L2 force moment and pressure-center runs.
note: Reference surface for future live multi-axis A4MC L2 static-airframe coefficient fitting.
